sections.paragraph:
μαργαρίτης, ου, ὁ (Theophr.; Strabo; Aelian, NA 10, 13; pap; En 18:7; TestJud 13:5; loanw. in rabb.) pearl

ⓐ w. gold 1 Ti 2:9. W. gold and precious stones Rv 17:4; 18:12, 16. Of the pearls that serve as gates for the heavenly city 21:21 (each gate a single pearl: EBurrows, JTS 43, ’42, 177–79). καλοὶ μ. Mt 13:45; πολύτιμος μ. a very valuable pearl vs. 46 (μ. more in demand than gold, Chares of Mitylene [IV b.c.]: 125 Fgm. 3 Jac. Among the Indians worth 3 times as much as pure gold: Arrian, Ind. 8, 13 and always in great demand: ibid. 8, 9)

ⓑ in imagery, in a proverb (s. χοῖρος) βάλλειν τοὺς μ. ἔμπροσθεν τ. χοίρων throw pearls to swine i.e. entrust someth. precious (cp. the reff. cited in Betz, SM 499 n. 590; s. also Eur., Bacch. 480; on the value placed on pearls in antiquity s. also HUsener, Die Perle: Weizsäcker Festschr. 1892, 203–13) to people who cannot or will not appreciate it Mt 7:6 (difft. GSchwartz, NovT 14, ’72, 18–25). πνευματικοὶ μ. spiritual pearls of a martyr’s bonds IEph 11:2.—HKahane, Traditio 13, ’57, 421–24; RAC 505–52; Kl. Pauly 3, 1020f; BHHW III 1422f.—DELG. EDNT. TW. Sv.

Theophr Theophr , IV–III b.c.—List 5

Strabo Strabo , I b.c.–I a.d.—List 5

Aelian Aelian , II a.d.—List 5

pap pap = papyrus, -yri

En En = I Enoch—List 2

TestJud TestJud = Testament of Judah, s. Test12Patr—List 2

loanw. loanw. = loanword

rabb. rabb. = rabbinical (literature etc.)

JTS JTS = Journal of Theological Studies—List 6

Fgm. Fgm. = fragment, fragmentary

Jac. Jac. = Die Fragmente der griechischen Historiker, ed. FJacoby—Lists 5, 6

Arrian Arrian = Flavius Arrianus, I–II a.d.—List 5

ibid. ibid. = ibidem (in the same book or passage)

i.e.

i.e. = id est (that is)

I.-E. Indo-European

someth. someth. = something

  1. cp. = compare, freq. in ref. to citation fr. ancient texts

Betz, SM Betz, SM = The Sermon on the Mount (Hermeneia)—List 6

Eur Eur , V b.c.—List 5

Festschr. Festschr. = Festschrift, in ref. to any honorary publication

difft. difft. = different(ly)

NovT NovT = Novum Testamentum (periodical)—List 6

IEph IEph = Ignatius to the Ephesians—List 1

RAC RAC = Reallexikon für Antike u. Christentum—List 6

Kl. Pauly Kl. Pauly = Der Kleine Pauly: Lexikon der Antike—List 6

BHHW BHHW = Biblisch-historisches Handwörterbuch—List 6

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

EDNT EDNT = Exegetical Dictionary of the NT—List 6

TW TW = Theologisches Wörterbuch zum NT; tr. GBromiley, Theological Dictionary of the NT—List 6

Sv Sv (at the end of entries)=HSieben, Voces—List 6

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 616
